description: This file implements a mock backend server as an OkHttp interceptor for a demo app. It handles authentication, token refresh, and protected resource access by simulating server responses, with shared server state methods for tokens and expiry.

classes.name: MockBackendInterceptor
classes.description: A Kotlin class that acts as a fake backend API, processing HTTP requests for login, token refresh, and protected resource access, simulating server-side behavior for demo purposes.

methods.name: intercept
methods.description: Overrides the Interceptor method to handle different API endpoints like login, refresh, and protected resource with mock responses.

methods.name: issueTokens
methods.description: Generates new mock access and refresh tokens with expiry times, updating shared server state.

methods.name: readUtf8Body
methods.description: Reads and returns the string content of an HTTP request body.

methods.name: parseJsonField
methods.description: Naive JSON parser to extract the value of a specific field from a simple JSON string.

methods.name: tokenResponseJson
methods.description: Constructs a JSON string representing token response data.

methods.name: jsonResponse
methods.description: Builds an OkHttp Response object with given status code and JSON body.
